subject: Multiple small alien creatures with elongated snouts and clawed limbs swarming over an ornate decorated surface covered in gold and blue patterns
description: Four or more gremlin-like creatures with smooth pinkish-tan skin, elongated trunk-like snouts, and bright blue eyes cluster together on and around an ornately decorated surface. The surface is covered in interlocking gold filigree and blue-purple patterned panels, suggesting a wall or large artifact. At least three creatures are clearly visible in the foreground at various scales, suggesting some are closer and some further. A fifth creature is partially visible at upper right. The gremlin figures are lean with long fingers and searching postures, seemingly exploring or investigating the decorated surface.
foreground: multiple gremlin creatures with trunk-like snouts on ornate surface
background: gold filigree and blue-purple decorative panel surface
